failure_modes.cause: BPR seal degradation or incorrect setting allowing DMF vapor escape at 150°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Install redundant BPR with vapor trap and continuous pressure monitoring

failure_modes.cause: Product crystallization in 43.8m tube length during cooling or concentration gradients
failure_modes.mitigation: Install inline filters and maintain tube temperature above solubility limit

failure_modes.mode: Pump failure at ultra-low flow rate
failure_modes.cause: Pump seal leakage or pulsation damping failure at Q=0.066 mL/min
failure_modes.mitigation: Use syringe pump with leak detection and flow rate verification

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — failure causes DMF vapor release
Single pump — failure stops reaction completely
validation_experiments: Run DMF blank at 150°C for 8 hours; monitor BPR pressure stability and vapor emissions
Inject product solution at reaction concentration; check for precipitation in cooling zones
Operate pump at Q=0.066 mL/min for 24 hours; measure flow rate drift and pressure pulsations
